creator: marietto2008@gmail.com
text:
That's not good. For many reasons :

1) I can see the usb stick in Windows,so it works,at least in Windows,it is recognized and I can copy and paste files from/to the usb stick

2) I don't have and you can't ask me to BUY a dedicated USB controller to be able to allow Rufus to detect the usb stick when Windows detects it

3) I can't pass the whole PCIe device / USB controller that in my case is : (00:14.0 USB controller: Intel Corporation Cannon Lake PCH USB 3.1 xHCI Host Controller) because I have several peripherals connected there that I can't disconnect from the host os

4) My mobo has only two PCIe lines,I have no space on the mobo to add another USB Controller.
